vlanGroup.description: A VLAN group definition for organizing VLANs

location.description: Location associated with this VLAN group (must correspond to a defined location)

name.description: Unique name of the VLAN group

range.description: VLAN ID range for this group (e.g., '100-199')

ucvni_group_name.description: UCVNI group name for network virtualization integration

description: VLAN group configuration schema for Nautobot IPAM VLAN organization
title: UnderStack VLAN Groups
